designDNA.concept: A festive Gujarati wedding invitation set inside a modern royal palace atmosphere, combining Shri Ganesh blessings, marigold celebration details, diya warmth, mandala ornament, and glassmorphic luxury against a deep jewel-tone backdrop.
designDNA.tone: Joyful, reverent, regal, warm, celebratory, and polished with a contemporary wedding-site sensibility.
designDNA.community: Gujarati wedding celebration presented through a Modern Western luxury layout language.
designDNA.styleDirection: Royal palace with Indo-Gujarati ceremonial motifs, dark jewel gradients, glowing gold accents, translucent glass surfaces, grand serif typography, and ornate but controlled decorative elements.

shapeLanguage.borderRadius: Soft pill and circular accents with ornate palace-inspired curves.
shapeLanguage.cardRadius: Large rounded glass cards around 20px-24px, with pill labels and circular date seals.
shapeLanguage.sectionRadius: Sweeping arches, domes, circular mandalas, and rounded palace panels.

designDNA.textureStyle: Layered radial jewel gradients, faint cream grid texture, translucent glass overlays, soft glow halos, and mandala/conic ornamental patterns used sparingly as background depth.
designDNA.shadowStyle: Luxurious medium-deep shadows with soft black depth, warm gold glows, and subtle inset highlights on glass surfaces.
designDNA.layoutPersonality: Grand editorial hero layout with generous spacing, asymmetric text-and-illustration balance, centered ceremonial alignment on mobile, and layered decorative depth without clutter.
sectionRules: Use marigold, saffron, cream, and gold as warm accents.
Preserve Gujarati ceremonial motifs with modern restraint.
Favor glassmorphic cards over flat white blocks.
Use grand serif headings and clean sans body text.
Keep shapes rounded, arched, circular, and palace-inspired.
Add soft glows rather than harsh highlights.
Use decorative motifs as framing, not clutter.
Keep copy warm, reverent, and celebratory.
Preserve generous spacing and luxury scale.
Avoid neon colors or playful cartoon motifs.
Avoid dense ornament that competes with content.
